specific_location: Doudy Draw Open Space, between the parking lot and the corral
description: This bird appeared to be a small, long-tailed, Spizella sparrow with an unstreaked gray breast. It was similar in size and shape to the Chipping and Clay-colored sparrows present. This bird had a pink bill, complete white eye-ring, a rather plain gray face with a bit of a rufous cap and a rufous post-ocular eye line. It had faint wing bars. I didn't observe the rump color.Behaviors: The bird perched briefly and then flew away.Call: nonePlumage: basic
